questions.prompt: A first-time SAT phishing campaign should be launched without first allowlisting Huntress's phishing IPs and domains in the customer's email security.
questions.explanation: Without allowlisting in M365's anti-spam policies (and any third-party email security), simulations are quarantined or blocked. The campaign produces unusable metrics.

questions.prompt: Which SAT chart most directly demonstrates the value of repeated training over time?
choices: Compromise Rate by Attempt (bucketed by which attempt number a learner is on)
questions.explanation: Compromise Rate by Attempt buckets learners by attempt number rather than calendar time, so it shows the trend that repeated training is intended to drive: lower compromise rate as learners cycle through more attempts.
